name: control mapping: when satisfied_by includes rubric_rule:<id>, the rule id must exist in the active aggregator output (no dangling references)
command:
printf "- framework: soc2-tsc
  control_id: CC8.1
  satisfied_by: [rubric_rule:g-vanished-001]
  legal_review_status: pending
" > controls.yaml && mkdir -p tree && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-controls-yaml.sh" "$PWD/controls.yaml" --check-references --tree "$PWD/tree"
